releaseNotes: Urgent fix: the multichannel audio fix crashed plain 2-channel (stereo) content - the vast majority of all audio - with a 'No mixing matrix' error, since it only handled 3-8 channel tracks. Movies/shows now play regardless of audio channel count. New: a video decoder that corrupts or freezes on real playback is now detected automatically from excessive dropped frames and permanently avoided on that device from then on. Performance: poster/backdrop images now decode at half the memory and CPU cost, cutting janky scrolling on low-RAM devices. Fix: a Dolby Vision decoder variant (DVAV) wasn't being filtered out like its DVHE counterpart. Tweak: buffer depth increased slightly on the Smooth profile.
